summary.lv: Clarity Labs meklē Associate ABAP izstrādātāju, kas projektēs, izstrādās, testēs un uzturēs ABAP programmas, atskaites un SAP integrācijas (BAPI, IDoc, RFC, REST/SOAP).
summary.en: Clarity Labs is hiring an Associate ABAP Developer to design, develop, test and maintain ABAP programs, reports and SAP integrations (BAPI, IDoc, RFC, REST/SOAP).
